tasks.title: Build core platform database schema
tasks.description: Create SQLite database schema using SQLAlchemy. Tables needed: clients (id, name, email, phone), points_balances (id, client_id, program_name, balance, last_updated), award_searches (id, client_id, origin, destination, cabin, status, created_at), booking_pipeline (id, client_id, airline, route, cabin, miles_required, status, created_at). Save models to platform/src/models/models.py. Include a seed script at platform/src/migrations/seed.py that adds 3 sample clients with points balances.
tasks.completion_summary: Built core platform database schema using SQLAlchemy, including tables for clients, points balances, award searches, and booking pipeline. Created a seed script to add 3 sample clients with points balances. Updated requirements.txt with necessary dependencies.
